overview.description: Innovation lab and AI consulting firm turning radical ideas into reality
overview.description_long: Insane Business Ideas is an innovation laboratory that transforms bold, unconventional ideas into reality, frequently using AI as a co-creator. Founded to push the limits of business, the firm helps corporations unleash their digital potential through radical innovation methods. It is best known for producing the first AI-written theatrical play in the world — 'When a Robot Writes a Play' — performed in Prague, which sparked global discussion about AI creativity. The company provides AI strategy, governance, and digital transformation consulting across industries including healthcare, smart cities, energy, and culture.
overview.tagline: Digital sustainability for industry, healthcare, cities and life. Radical tech innovation.

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague to push the boundaries of business through radical, unconventional innovation. Became known globally for producing the first AI-written theatrical play, 'When a Robot Writes a Play', staged in Prague.

key_milestones.event: Produced 'When a Robot Writes a Play' — first AI-authored theatrical production in the world, performed in Prague

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Innovation consulting and AI strategy advisory work can be partially commoditized as AI tools improve, but the firm's value lies in creative facilitation, interdisciplinary methods, and human judgment — which are harder to automate. Their track record in novel AI-art experiments (AI-written play) shows genuine expertise beyond prompt engineering.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: AI strategy consulting, governance, and digital transformation advisory are in high and growing demand across enterprises and public sector, especially in EU markets with AI Act compliance requirements.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Very small team of ~5 people with no known external funding. Boutique consultancy operating since 2011 — longevity suggests sustainability, but limited scale and no investor backing create fragility if key people leave or demand shifts.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Long operating history since 2011 and a genuinely distinctive brand (first AI-written play) provide credibility and differentiation. However, the micro-scale of the team, absence of known funding, and broad-brush service offering with no clear proprietary product create meaningful execution risk.

metadata.notes: Very small boutique innovation lab / AI consultancy. Notable for producing 'When a Robot Writes a Play' (first AI-authored theatrical play). Address: Celetná 19, 110 00 Praha 1. Email: info@inbui.com. LinkedIn lists ~5 employees and Tomas Studenik as a key person. Company website (inbui.com) is on Squarespace and not crawlable. Year of the AI play milestone is estimated; CNAIP page did not specify a year.
